name: Automated Exfiltration via Scheduled Transfer
description: Detects scheduled or recurring data exfiltration patterns
query:
// Detect automated exfiltration patterns
// Trigger on recurring outbound data transfers at regular intervals
events from ndr_flow
where direction = "outbound"
  and bytes_sent > 10000000
group by source_ip, destination_ip
having count(*) > 3
within 3600 seconds
